description: This Java class `DefectController` serves as a REST API controller for managing defect entities. It provides endpoints for listing, retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting defects. It uses Spring Boot annotations for request mappings and Swagger annotations for API documentation, and interacts with a service layer `DefectService` to perform business logic.

classes.name: DefectController
classes.description: REST API controller class for defect management, providing endpoints to list, retrieve, create, update, and delete defect entries.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list defects with optional filtering and pagination.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Handles GET requests to fetch a defect by its ID.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Handles POST requests to create a new defect entry.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Handles PUT requests to update an existing defect by ID.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Handles DELETE requests to remove a defect by ID.
